texto: My dance teacher said "you are not a real dancer until your toes bleed from pointing all day" so I did just that. At that time when I went back to her she said "bravo. You have learned to live with pain. You are a real dancer.
explicacao: Citação de Dancer sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “My dance teacher said "you are not a real dancer until your toes bleed from pointing all day" so …” articula educacao, dance, reflexao em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
